stemHtml: Which of the following statements is correct about Monsoons?

options.a:
Summer: onshore wind, blowing from the sea towards the land.
Winter: offshore wind, blowing from the land to the sea.
options.b:
Summer: offshore wind, blowing from the land to the sea.
Winter: onshore wind, blowing from the sea towards the land.
options.c:
Summer: offshore wind, blowing from the land to the sea.
Winter: offshore wind, blowing from the land to the sea.
options.d:
Summer: onshore wind, blowing from the sea towards the land.
Winter: onshore wind, blowing from the sea towards the land.
